title: feat(agentSkills): add skill version list API and fix OpenAPI spec
known_problem: The old environment missed bun, so projects/volume-manager failed before validating the patch; this image installs bun explicitly.

commands.name: toolchain_with_bun
commands.shell: node --version && npm --version && pnpm --version && bun --version && docker --version && git --version
commands.reason: This PR requires bun; make bun availability an explicit environment gate.

commands.name: compose_dev
commands.reason: Validate the real dev compose file syntax.

commands.name: compose_dev_cn
commands.reason: Validate the CN dev compose file syntax.

commands.name: build_volume_manager
commands.shell: bun install --frozen-lockfile || true; bun run build
commands.reason: volume-manager uses Bun runtime APIs and must build inside a bun-enabled image.

commands.name: prepare_sdks
commands.reason: Rebuild generated SDK dist files after git clean before app build.

commands.name: build_projects_app
commands.reason: The new agentSkills list API needs app build validation.
